feed.title: Mattias Rask
feed.subtitle: Long-form notes on systems, security, and the tools I build

entry.title: Cisco Modeling Labs on Google Cloud
entry.summary: CML 2.10 on a Google Cloud VM for CCNP study: the nested virtualization flag, a Tailscale-only perimeter, and the two Docker bugs between install and the first booted lab.

entry.title: Building bettermemory
entry.summary: Persistent memory for AI coding agents, retrieved on demand rather than pre-loaded. Notes on the design, and everything added since 2.0.
